disk.description: Specifies the name or self-link of the disk to which the resource policy will be attached.

name.description: Specifies the name of the resource policy attachment, used to associate a resource policy with a Google Compute Disk.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeout durations for operations such as creating, updating, or deleting the disk resource policy attachment.

zone.description: Specifies the zone where the disk and resource policy attachment are located. Must match the zone of the disk.
